description: Computes a linear estimate for coverage between two points (x0, y0) and (x1, y1) based on a given x value.
Checks if the segment defined by (x0, y0) and (x1, y1) is degenerate (x1 equals x0).
Checks if clamping is enabled for the coverage estimate.
Checks if the computed y value is lower than the minimum y value of the segment.
Checks if the computed y value is higher than the maximum y value of the segment.
